name: Swiss Steak Ala Kathy
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Brown the beef steak until browned on all sides.
3. Add sliced onions and chopped garlic to the pot. Cook for 2-3 minutes until softened.
4. Pour catsup over the meat, onions, and garlic. Stir to coat evenly.
5. If needed, add water to reach desired sauce consistency.
6. Cover the pot and reduce heat to low. Simmer gently until the steak is tender, about 30-40 minutes.
7. Once cooked, remove the skillet from heat.
